parents.subject: LU-8502 test: Baseline test failure rates

commit.subject: LU-8502 test: Run LU-7372 patch against failing tests
commit.message:
LU-8502 test: Run LU-7372 patch against failing tests

replay-vbr test 1b, LU-8502, and for replay-dual test 26,
LU-7372, are suspected to be failing for the same issue and
this issue is thought to be resolved with patch 17853.

Test patch 17853 against these tests to see if we actually
have a fix.

This patch is not intended to land.

Test-Parameters: trivial testgroup=full
Test-Parameters: testgroup=full

Signed-off-by: James Nunez <james.a.nunez@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ib54a9ec3d273973dc77b8f73d760807c496e968e
